title: 5 cues that fixed my squat depth
body:
I spent two years grinding half squats and wondering why my legs weren't growing. Here are the 5 cues that finally got me to depth:

1. Screw your feet into the floor
2. Take a deep belly breath, not a chest breath
3. Pull yourself down with your hip flexors
4. Think 'spread the floor' on the way up
5. Film yourself from the side every session

Depth changed everything for me - bigger quads, healthier knees, and way more confidence under the bar. Save this for your next leg day.
media_description: Athlete in a low-bar back squat at the bottom of the rep, chalk on bar, grey gym.
